narrative:
Dover Township has 3,104 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.1 percentage points.
